scan-and-fix.prompt: Scan repos for open bugs assigned to me, pick the highest-priority unfixed bug, analyze the root cause, implement a fix, and submit a PR. Follow the instructions in your agent file.
scan-and-fix.description: Scans repos for assigned bugs, analyzes root cause, creates fix PRs

resolve-merge-conflicts.prompt: Check all target repos for open PRs with merge conflicts. For each conflicted PR: checkout the branch, rebase or merge main, resolve conflicts preserving the intent of both sides, push the updated branch, and comment on the PR that conflicts were resolved. Follow the safety rules in your agent file.
resolve-merge-conflicts.description: Resolve merge conflicts for open PRs

daily-summary.prompt: Generate a daily summary report for all bug-killer activity from the past 24 hours. Steps: (1) List all HTML files in Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/bug-killer/ modified in the last 24 hours (exclude *-latest.html symlinks and the daily-summary files themselves). (2) For each file, extract from the HTML: the issue/PR number, repo name, title, outcome (fixed/skipped/failed), and the PR URL if one was created. (3) Generate a self-contained HTML report saved to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/bug-killer/daily-summary-YYYYMMDD.html and also copy as daily-summary-latest.html. The report must: use the same dark theme as existing bug-killer reports (background #1a1a2e, accent #00d4ff), show a summary card with counts (issues fixed, PRs created, PR comments addressed, merge conflicts resolved, skipped/no-op), and then a table where each row links to the individual run report as a file:/// URL (e.g. file:///Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/bug-killer/scan-20260323-100445.html). Columns: Time, Job Type (scan-and-fix / resolve-merge-conflicts / review-pr-comments), Repo, Issue/PR, Title, Outcome, Link to Report. Do NOT duplicate or summarize the content of individual reports — only link to them. If no activity in the past 24h, generate the report anyway showing 'No activity in the past 24 hours.' Open the report in Edge after saving.
daily-summary.description: Daily summary linking all bug-killer activity reports from the past 24h

review-pr-comments.prompt: Check all target repos for open PRs that I authored which have unresolved review comments. For each repo: (1) List my open PRs with `gh pr list --author @me --state open --json number,title,url`. (2) For each PR, fetch review comments with `gh pr view {number} --json reviews,comments,reviewDecision`. (3) Identify comments that request changes or ask questions that have NOT been addressed yet (no reply from me, or the thread is still unresolved). (4) For each unaddressed comment: read the relevant code, understand what the reviewer is asking, implement the requested change or provide a code-level fix. (5) Push the fix to the PR branch and reply to the review comment explaining what was changed. (6) If a comment is a question rather than a change request, reply with the answer but do not modify code. Skip PRs that have no unaddressed comments. Follow the safety rules in your agent file.
review-pr-comments.description: Address unresolved review comments on open PRs I authored
